✦   a love letter   ✦

Haidy

Happy Birthday, my love

On this day the world became a little more beautiful — because you were born into it. Every moment with you is a gift I never knew I deserved.

scroll

Our moments together and more yet to come

Why I love you

01

The way your eyes light up when you laugh — it makes the whole world stop.

02

You make ordinary days feel like the ones worth remembering forever.

03

Your kindness is quiet and endless — it reaches everyone around you.

04

You are my calm in every storm, and my joy in every season.

05

Loving you feels like home — the safest, warmest place I know.

06

Every version of you — you have ever been — is someone I fall for again.

07

I'm in love with your smile.

A note from the heart

Haidy,

I could spend a thousand birthdays trying to tell you what you mean to me, and still fall short of the words. You are the person I choose, every single day — in the big moments and the quiet ones, in laughter and in silence.

On your birthday, I want you to know that being loved by you is the greatest thing that has ever happened to me. You deserve every beautiful thing this world has to offer — and I promise to spend every day making sure you feel it.

Here's to you, my love. Happy Birthday.

— Fahd  ♥
